articles.title: PrivacyPal acquires WEB3 REX Inc., accelerating enterprise AI governance
articles.author: PrivacyPal Newsroom
articles.excerpt: PrivacyPal LLC has acquired and integrated WEB3 REX Inc., adding specialized technical talent and an intellectual-property portfolio across advanced data synthetics and decentralized blockchain technologies.

body.text: For immediate release

BOCA RATON, FL — June 23, 2026 — PrivacyPal LLC (“PrivacyPal” or the “Company”), the premier on-device governance and security infrastructure for artificial intelligence, today announced the successful acquisition and corporate integration of WEB3 REX INC.
Strategic Acquisition and IP Expansion

Through this definitive acquisition, PrivacyPal integrates WEB3 REX INC.’s highly specialized technical talent and robust intellectual property portfolio into its core infrastructure. This strategic transaction equips PrivacyPal with pioneering capabilities across advanced data synthetics and decentralized blockchain technologies. The addition of these crucial technological assets exponentially strengthens PrivacyPal’s competitive moat, deepens its IP portfolio, and dramatically accelerates its product expansion roadmap to meet the rapidly evolving demands of enterprise AI.

We are thrilled to officially integrate WEB3 REX INC. into our corporate ecosystem. The enterprise market demands a comprehensive trust and enablement layer beneath the AI Operating System—one that provides absolute, ecosystem-wide control without fracturing the user experience. By incorporating these next-generation synthetics and blockchain frameworks, we are uniquely positioned to rapidly scale our on-device governance models and proprietary synthetic data engines, securing the AI frontier for enterprises globally.
About PrivacyPal LLC

PrivacyPal is the leading on-device governance and enablement layer engineered for the Age of AI. Utilizing real-time data interception, granular prompt-level DSPM, and a strict zero-knowledge architecture, PrivacyPal empowers global organizations to govern every AI interaction seamlessly. The PrivacyPal ecosystem provides seamless integration across macOS, Windows, iOS, Android, and web environments, ensuring total digital sovereignty and regulatory compliance. For more information, please visit https://privacypal.ai.
Forward-Looking Statements

articles.title: PrivacyPal and WEB3 REX Inc. terminate definitive agreement with Vocodia Holdings Corp.
articles.author: PrivacyPal Newsroom
articles.excerpt: PrivacyPal LLC and WEB3 REX Inc. have formally terminated their Securities Purchase and Share Exchange Agreement with Vocodia Holdings Corp. (OTC: VHAI). CEO Jason Melo remains fully focused on PrivacyPal.

body.text: For immediate release

BOCA RATON, FL — June 22, 2026 — PrivacyPal LLC and WEB3 REX INC. today announced the formal termination of their definitive Securities Purchase and Share Exchange Agreement (the “Agreement”) with Vocodia Holdings Corp. (OTC: VHAI).
Termination of the Definitive Agreement with Vocodia

The termination of the proposed transaction was effectuated due to Vocodia’s inability to satisfy essential closing conditions necessary to consummate the acquisition under the terms of the Agreement dated January 13, 2026. Pursuant to the provisions of the Agreement, WEB3 REX INC. has formally exercised its right to terminate the transaction. While the strategic combination will not be consummated, PrivacyPal and WEB3 REX INC. express their appreciation to the Vocodia team for their collaboration during the negotiation process and extend their best wishes for Vocodia’s future corporate endeavors.

Consequently, Jason Melo will not be joining Vocodia Holdings Corp. as Chief Executive Officer. Mr. Melo will remain fully dedicated to his role as Chief Executive Officer of PrivacyPal, advancing its strategic enterprise initiatives alongside the other high-growth companies within his corporate portfolio.

While our prospective path with Vocodia has concluded, our fundamental corporate trajectory has never been stronger or more sharply focused. The enterprise market demands a comprehensive trust and enablement layer beneath the AI Operating System—one that provides absolute, ecosystem-wide control without fracturing the user experience.
About PrivacyPal LLC

PrivacyPal is the leading on-device governance and enablement layer engineered for the Age of AI. Utilizing real-time data interception, granular prompt-level DSPM, and a strict zero-knowledge architecture, PrivacyPal empowers global organizations to govern every AI interaction seamlessly. The PrivacyPal ecosystem provides seamless integration across macOS, Windows, iOS, Android, and web environments, ensuring total digital sovereignty and regulatory compliance. For more information, please visit https://privacypal.ai.

articles.title: Introducing Privacy Twins 2.0: synthetic substitution in real time
articles.author: PrivacyPal Newsroom
articles.excerpt: A new generation of on-device models replaces sensitive values with coherent, context-preserving synthetic data — so the model still understands the prompt, and the secret never leaves.

body.text: Redaction breaks the prompt. Replace a customer's name with [REDACTED] and the model loses the thread; replace a transaction with black bars and the analysis falls apart. Privacy Twins 2.0 takes a different path: it substitutes sensitive values with coherent synthetic equivalents that preserve meaning, structure, and relationships — so the model still does its job, and the real data never crosses the boundary.
What's new

items: Context-aware substitution that keeps entities consistent across a whole conversation.
A faster on-device detection model with broader coverage of regulated data types.
Reversible mapping under policy, so authorized workflows can re-link results downstream.
Full audit of every substitution — what was detected, what was swapped, and why.

body.text: The goal was never to hide data from the model. It was to give the model something just as useful that happens to be safe.
Privacy Twins 2.0 is rolling out to all customers over the coming weeks, on by default for new policies.

articles.title: PrivacyPal launches on Windows 11 and macOS
articles.author: PrivacyPal Newsroom
articles.excerpt: On-device protection arrives natively on the desktop — real-time Privacy Twins on Windows 11 and macOS, governed by a single policy and live in about a minute.

body.text: Today PrivacyPal is available natively on Windows 11 and macOS. The same real-time Privacy Twins that protect every AI interaction now run on the desktop — substituting sensitive data on-device, before a single token ever reaches a model.

Both builds are signed and notarized — a trusted publisher on Windows, notarized by Apple — so there are no scary first-launch dialogs. Drop it in, sign in, and your AI guardrails work everywhere in about a minute.
What you get on day one

items: Native builds for Windows 11 and macOS — Apple Silicon and Intel.
Real-time, on-device Privacy Twins across every AI app and browser tab.
One policy for the whole fleet — write it once, enforce it on every endpoint.
Zero-touch distribution through your existing MDM, with sub-10ms p95 overhead and full audit on.

body.text: Protection has to live where the work happens. For most teams that's the desktop — so that's where we made it effortless.
Download for Windows or macOS from the home page, or roll it out across your organization from the admin console today.
